title: Beauty Product Adaptation
description: A premium skincare visual style adapted into a new product ad.
resultNotes: Use this to show the mother-template to product-ad transformation.

title: App Tool Adaptation
description: A clean app screen-demo structure adapted into another AI tool workflow ad.
resultNotes: Use this to explain how UI rhythm and feature cards can be reused.

title: Game Wishlist Adaptation
description: A game wishlist ad style adapted into a different world, character and mood.
resultNotes: Use this to show structure preservation with a new game identity.

title: Food Beverage Adaptation
description: A home gadget demo style adapted for a food and beverage product.
resultNotes: Demonstrates how a product demo template transfers to consumable goods.

title: Travel Destination Adaptation
description: A problem-solution style adapted into a travel destination experience.
resultNotes: Shows how a pet product template structure works for experience marketing.

title: Fitness Product Adaptation
description: A problem-fix ad style adapted for a fitness product before-and-after.
resultNotes: Demonstrates how transformation-style templates translate to health products.

title: Automotive Ad Adaptation
description: A social proof caption style adapted into a premium car commercial short.
resultNotes: Shows how UGC-style rhythm works for high-consideration purchase ads.

title: Ecommerce Offer Adaptation
description: An unboxing style adapted into an ecommerce product offer showcase.
resultNotes: Demonstrates how reveal-driven templates work for online store products.

title: Education Course Adaptation
description: A three-step workflow demo adapted into an online education course ad.
resultNotes: Shows how procedural demo templates translate to learning products.

title: Electronics Product Adaptation
description: An electronics feature-pop style adapted for a new consumer gadget.
resultNotes: Demonstrates how spec-highlight templates generalize across device categories.
